description: In or out of the water, these nike sandals with Amphibious outsole will go with  you anywhere.  Take to the great outdoors with confidence and styleUpperSynthetic straps for durability and easy maintenance Cushioning inside straps for comfortable FitAdjustable clip lock closures and adjustable front strap for a snug, customised fitCushioned PU footbedPull loop at back heelMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight feel and shock absorption OutsoleAll-Trac Amphibious outsoleAgressive lugs for absolute grip on all terrainsSandal careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
